requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Household Refrigerating Appliances (PNS CISPR 14 series / NTC for radio-enabled models)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（PNS CISPR 14系列 / 含无线功能型号的NTC）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（PNS CISPR 14系列 / 含無線功能型號的NTC）

summary.en: Electromagnetic compatibility for household appliances in the Philippines is addressed through Philippine National Standards adopting the CISPR 14 series — PNS CISPR 14-1 (emission requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus) and PNS CISPR 14-2 (immunity) — applied as part of the broader BPS product-quality and safety framework. Standard household refrigerators are not stand-alone telecommunications devices, so dedicated radio approval is generally not triggered. However, where a refrigerator incorporates wireless connectivity (Wi-Fi or Bluetooth for smart-home features), the National Telecommunications Commission (NTC) requires Type Approval or Type Acceptance and an NTC certificate for the radio module before importation and sale, covering frequency, power, and interference limits. EMC performance against the CISPR 14 emission limits supports BPS certification, and the appliance must operate without harmful interference on the 230 V 60 Hz Philippine supply.
summary.zh: 菲律宾家用器具的电磁兼容通过采用CISPR 14系列的菲律宾国家标准处理——PNS CISPR 14-1（家用器具、电动工具及类似器具的发射要求）和PNS CISPR 14-2（抗扰度）——作为BPS产品质量与安全框架的一部分适用。标准家用电冰箱并非独立的电信设备，故通常不触发专门的无线电批准。但若电冰箱含有无线连接功能（用于智能家居的Wi-Fi或蓝牙），国家电信委员会（NTC）要求在进口和销售前对该无线模块取得型号批准或型号认可及NTC证书，涵盖频率、功率及干扰限值。符合CISPR 14发射限值的电磁兼容性能支撑BPS认证，且器具须在菲律宾230 V 60 Hz供电下运行而不产生有害干扰。
summary.zht: 菲律賓家用器具的電磁相容通過採用CISPR 14系列的菲律賓國家標準處理——PNS CISPR 14-1（家用器具、電動工具及類似器具的發射要求）和PNS CISPR 14-2（抗擾度）——作為BPS產品質量與安全框架的一部分適用。標準家用電冰箱並非獨立的電信設備，故通常不觸發專門的無線電批准。但若電冰箱含有無線連接功能（用於智慧家居的Wi-Fi或藍牙），國家電信委員會（NTC）要求在進口和銷售前對該無線模組取得型號批准或型號認可及NTC證書，涵蓋頻率、功率及干擾限值。符合CISPR 14發射限值的電磁相容性能支撐BPS認證，且器具須在菲律賓230 V 60 Hz供電下運行而不產生有害干擾。

standards_or_laws: PNS CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (adopted by BPS from CISPR 14-1)
PNS CISPR 14-2 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (adopted by BPS from CISPR 14-2)
NTC Memorandum Circulars on Type Approval / Type Acceptance — required for radio-enabled (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth) refrigerator models, administered by the National Telecommunications Commission
Republic Act No. 4109 (Standards Law) — BPS product certification framework

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances are primarily governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (Part 2: Immunity; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015). For harmonic emissions, GB 17625.1-2022 (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020) applies. These standards are enforced under the CCC mandatory certification regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. For refrigerators with wireless modules, China requires SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval for the radio component — a separate regime from CCC. CNAS-accredited Chinese EMC reports against GB 4343.1 are not automatically accepted by BPS, and Chinese SRRC radio approval does not satisfy NTC requirements.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具的电磁兼容要求主要依据GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗扰度；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）执行。谐波发射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（强制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）适用。上述标准在市场监管总局/认证认可监督管理委员会（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC强制认证制度下执行。对于含无线模块的电冰箱，中国要求对无线组件取得SRRC（国家无线电管理）型号核准——独立于CCC的制度。CNAS认可的中国实验室依据GB 4343.1出具的电磁兼容报告不被BPS自动接受，且中国SRRC无线电核准不满足NTC要求。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具的電磁相容要求主要依據GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗擾度；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）執行。諧波發射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（強制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）適用。上述標準在市場監管總局/認證認可監督管理委員會（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC強制認證制度下執行。對於含無線模組的電冰箱，中國要求對無線元件取得SRRC（國家無線電管理）型號核准——獨立於CCC的制度。CNAS認可的中國實驗室依據GB 4343.1出具的電磁相容報告不被BPS自動接受，且中國SRRC無線電核准不滿足NTC要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
SRRC type approval — required for wireless modules in connected appliances (separate from CCC)

gap.en: Because both China GB 4343.1 and Philippine PNS CISPR 14-1 derive from the CISPR 14 series, the technical emission content is closely aligned for most refrigerator types. The gaps are procedural: (1) No automatic acceptance — BPS certification (ICC/PS) relies on its own recognised laboratories; CNAS-accredited GB 4343.1 reports are not automatically accepted and EMC evidence may need re-issuance or re-testing acceptable to BPS. (2) Radio approval for connected models — a refrigerator with Wi-Fi or Bluetooth requires NTC Type Approval/Type Acceptance in the Philippines; Chinese SRRC approval does not transfer, and the NTC certificate must be obtained before importation. (3) Frequency-plan differences — wireless modules must comply with the Philippine frequency allocation enforced by NTC, which may differ from the Chinese allocation, so the radio configuration must be verified. (4) Supply conditions — emission/immunity verification should reflect the 230 V 60 Hz Philippine mains rather than the 220 V 50 Hz basis used in Chinese testing.
gap.zh: 由于中国GB 4343.1与菲律宾PNS CISPR 14-1均源自CISPR 14系列，对于大多数电冰箱类型，技术发射内容高度一致。差距在于程序层面：（1）非自动接受——BPS认证（ICC/PS）依赖其自有认可实验室；CNAS认可的GB 4343.1报告不被自动接受，电磁兼容证据可能须重新签发或由BPS接受的重新检测。（2）联网型号的无线电批准——含Wi-Fi或蓝牙的电冰箱在菲律宾须取得NTC型号批准/型号认可；中国SRRC核准不可转移，且须在进口前取得NTC证书。（3）频率规划差异——无线模块须符合NTC执行的菲律宾频率分配，可能与中国分配不同，故须核验无线电配置。（4）供电条件——发射/抗扰度验证应反映菲律宾230 V 60 Hz电网，而非中国检测所用的220 V 50 Hz基准。
gap.zht: 由於中國GB 4343.1與菲律賓PNS CISPR 14-1均源自CISPR 14系列，對於大多數電冰箱類型，技術發射內容高度一致。差距在於程序層面：（1）非自動接受——BPS認證（ICC/PS）依賴其自有認可實驗室；CNAS認可的GB 4343.1報告不被自動接受，電磁相容證據可能須重新簽發或由BPS接受的重新檢測。（2）聯網型號的無線電批准——含Wi-Fi或藍牙的電冰箱在菲律賓須取得NTC型號批准/型號認可；中國SRRC核准不可轉移，且須在進口前取得NTC證書。（3）頻率規劃差異——無線模組須符合NTC執行的菲律賓頻率分配，可能與中國分配不同，故須核驗無線電配置。（4）供電條件——發射/抗擾度驗證應反映菲律賓230 V 60 Hz電網，而非中國檢測所用的220 V 50 Hz基準。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory via BPS product certification (EMC per PNS CISPR 14 series within ICC/PS scope); NTC Type Approval/Type Acceptance additionally mandatory for radio-enabled (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth) refrigerator models before importation
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); SRRC type approval mandatory for wireless modules; enforced by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC for household refrigerators in the Philippines follows the PNS CISPR 14 series within the BPS product certification scope, which is technically close to China GB 4343.1 but requires BPS-acceptable evidence rather than automatic CCC/CNAS acceptance. Refrigerators with Wi-Fi or Bluetooth additionally require NTC Type Approval/Type Acceptance before importation; Chinese SRRC radio approval does not transfer. Verification should reflect the 230 V 60 Hz Philippine supply.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 菲律宾家用电冰箱的电磁兼容在BPS产品认证范围内遵循PNS CISPR 14系列，技术上接近中国GB 4343.1，但须提供BPS可接受的证据，而非自动接受CCC/CNAS。含Wi-Fi或蓝牙的电冰箱在进口前另须取得NTC型号批准/型号认可；中国SRRC无线电核准不可转移。验证应反映菲律宾230 V 60 Hz供电。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 菲律賓家用電冰箱的電磁相容在BPS產品認證範圍內遵循PNS CISPR 14系列，技術上接近中國GB 4343.1，但須提供BPS可接受的證據，而非自動接受CCC/CNAS。含Wi-Fi或藍牙的電冰箱在進口前另須取得NTC型號批准/型號認可；中國SRRC無線電核准不可轉移。驗證應反映菲律賓230 V 60 Hz供電。
